style_a.name: 灰暗现实主义
style_a.prompt_suffix: handheld camera, film grain, desaturated cold tones, blue-grey color palette, urban isolation, dimly lit

style_b.name: 东方赛博神话
style_b.prompt_suffix: epic cyber mythology, golden and neon blue palette, weightless atmosphere, digital particles, majestic scale

music_sync.lyrics: [闪切：现实←→数字] 哪怕世界说 你不过是一颗棋子 / [代码之翼展开] 我偏要逆风 写出自己的程式

atmosphere.overall_mood: AB世界快速闪切对比——现实地铁站中的棋子 vs 数字世界展翅的战士，最终代码之翼展开
atmosphere.lighting: A世界荧光灯冷白光 ↔ B世界金色辉光交替

video_prompt: Rapid flash-cutting between grey subway reality and golden digital world: chess piece on tracks vs armored warrior, culminating in golden code wings unfurling, epic transcendence, 16:9, 15s.

bgm.description: 副歌第二段，持续高能，节奏中加入闪切效果——快速交替
bgm.instruments: 全乐器交替 + 电子闪切效果
bgm.dynamics: 高能持续 + 闪切节奏

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: [闪切A] 回到灰色现实——地铁站，主角以普通人形态被人群推搡

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 穿着灰色卫衣被人群推搡

transition.description: 从B世界闪回A世界——刺眼的风格跳转

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 强烈的风格落差——从金甲战士回到普通人
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 刺耳的风格切换音效 + 地铁站嘈杂声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Back in grey reality: a young man in dark grey hoodie being jostled and pushed by a crowd in a subway station, harsh fluorescent lights, handheld camera shake, cold sterile tones, film grain, sharp contrast from the epic golden world, urban isolation, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: [闪切B] 金甲战士在数字空间战斗——代码剑横扫一排障碍
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A golden cyber-armored warrior swinging a blazing code sword in a horizontal arc, slashing through a row of dark obstacles, golden energy explosion along the slash line, dynamic action pose, digital space background, cyber mythology combat, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: [闪切A] 现实——主角被困在地铁车厢内，周围全是面无表情的乘客，他像一颗棋子

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 坐在座位上低头，像棋子被安放在棋盘上

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 从上方俯视——一个人只是棋盘上的棋子
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 压抑的低频 + 地铁运行的机械声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Top-down overhead view of a subway car interior, rows of identical seats with blank-faced commuters, the protagonist sitting among them looking down, the grid pattern of seats resembling a chess board, the person like a awn on the board, cold grey tones, dehumanizing perspective, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: [闪切B] 数字空间——金甲战士猛然抬头，眼中金光闪烁

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 猛然抬头，面甲下双眼闪烁金光

storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Dramatic close-up of a cyber-armored warrior looking up fiercely, golden light blazing from behind the visor, intense defiant expression visible through the translucent face mask, golden energy flowing from the eyes, extreme determination, epic close-up, cyber mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: [AB融合] 两个世界开始叠加——灰色地铁站中出现金色的光翼轮廓

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 地铁站中的普通人形态，但背后开始出现金色光翼的虚影

transition.description: AB世界开始融合——金色元素渗入灰色世界

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 两个身份开始融合——灰色中出现金色
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 翅膀展开的能量共鸣声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: In a grey subway station, a young man in a hoodie standing with ghostly golden wing outlines beginning to shimmer behind his back, the golden light of the digital world bleeding into the grey reality, subtle fusion of two visual styles, the figure between two worlds, film grain mixed with golden particles, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 金色光翼越来越实体化，地铁站的灰色开始被金色取代

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 双翼越来越亮，身上开始出现铠甲纹路

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 强者打破了世界的规则——光翼压制了灰暗
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A young man in a subway station with golden wings becoming increasingly solid behind him, golden light spreading outward transforming the grey environment, golden cyber armor patterns emerging on his body replacing the hoodie, the grey world yielding to golden light, two styles merging, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 能量爆发——金色光翼完全展开，冲击波将灰色世界全部击碎

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 金色光翼完全展开，双臂张开，冲击波从身体向外扩散

transition.description: 灰色现实被光翼冲击波击碎——完全切入B世界

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 光翼全开——灰暗世界被彻底击溃
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 冲击波 + 翅膀展开的宏大声效
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Spectacular golden code wings fully unfurling from a transformed warrior, massive wingspan, a shockwave of golden light shattering the grey subway station reality into fragments, the figure ascending as grey fragments fall and golden digital space takes over, epic wing reveal, dramatic, cyber mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 金翼战士在纯净的数字空间中展翅翱翔，翼展巨大而壮观
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 自由翱翔——挣脱了一切束缚
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 风声 + 翅膀拍击的能量声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A golden armored warrior with massive golden code wings soaring through vast digital space, graceful flight pose, the enormous wings trailing streams of golden code particles, freedom and transcendence, epic scale panoramic view, golden and neon blue palette, cyber mythology angel, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 金翼战士仰天长啸——金色音波从口中扩散形成代码涟漪

characters.name: 程序员
characters.expression: 宣告——我不是棋子，我是创造者

transition.description: 啸声涟漪扩散——引出下一段

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 宣言——凡人不凡的最强声明
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 啸声回响 + 涟漪扩散音效
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A golden winged cyber warrior hovering in space, head thrown back in a powerful shout toward the heavens, golden sonic waves expanding outward from the mouth forming code pattern ripples, wings fully spread, dramatic upward angle, declaration of defiance, golden light radiating, cyber mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio
